title: salsola forskahlii
intro: Salsola forskahlii, also known as Coleus forskohlii, is a tropical plant native to parts of Asia and Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the production of cyclic AMP (cAMP) in the body, leading to various health benefits. The health benefits of Salsola forskahlii include weight loss, improved cardiovascular health, and increased muscle mass, making it a popular supplement among fitness enthusiasts. Salsola forskahlii can be consumed in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and teas, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
